R functions in TypeScript

TypeScript implementations of 13 R standard library functions across 1 module. Each function is individually importable and tree-shakeable.

base
  • abs
  • ceiling
  • floor
  • match
  • max
  • min
  • nchar
  • round
  • seq
  • sign
  • sqrt
  • tolower
  • toupper

We have 13 R functions so far - help us add more

Got a rainy Sunday afternoon and a taste for a porting puzzle?

  • Get inspiration from the R base documentation.
  • Click "New file" in the appropriate folder on GitHub. This will fork the project to your account, directly add the file to it, and send a Pull Request to us.

We will then review it. If it's useful to the project and in line with our contributing guidelines your work will become part of Locutus and you'll be automatically credited in the authors section accordingly.

Upstream Surface Inventory 13/7108 shipped • 44 next 0%

Locutus tracks 25 upstream namespaces for R and sorts them into what is already shipped, what we still want, what we intentionally keep, and what still needs a decision.

This inventory now tracks R's broader official base and recommended-package surface, excluding the wider CRAN ecosystem.

0% catalog shipped
Shipped Next Explicit non-goals
Tracked namespaces 25
Shipped 13/7108
Next to port 44
Explicit non-goals 7051

25 namespaces are currently tracked; 13 of 7108 upstream entries are already shipped; 44 are explicitly on the shortlist; 7051 are explicit non-goals.

base package

R 4.4 • Catalog source: live runtime snapshot r-base:4.4.2

1% shipped
13/1270 shipped 24 next 1233 explicit non-goals

13 shipped • 24 next • 1233 explicit non-goals.

base

Next

  • all Aggregate predicate helpers are strong plain-value targets.
  • any Aggregate predicate helpers are strong plain-value targets.
  • append Vector concatenation helpers have a clean plain-value contract.
  • cos Scalar math helpers remain useful plain-value targets.
  • diff Sequence differencing has a clean plain-value contract.
  • duplicated Duplicate detection is a strong plain-value target.
  • endsWith String boundary helpers are strong portability targets.
  • grepl Regex predicate helpers are strong portability targets.
  • gsub Regex replacement helpers are strong portability targets.
  • mean Aggregate math helpers remain useful portability targets.
  • order Ordering helpers are useful plain-value targets.
  • pmax Elementwise aggregate helpers have a clean plain-value contract.
  • pmin Elementwise aggregate helpers have a clean plain-value contract.
  • rank Ordering helpers are useful plain-value targets.
  • sin Scalar math helpers remain useful plain-value targets.
  • sort Ordering helpers are useful plain-value targets.
  • startsWith String boundary helpers are strong portability targets.
  • sub Regex replacement helpers are strong portability targets.
  • substr String slicing helpers are strong portability targets.
  • trimws Trimming helpers are strong plain-value targets.
  • unique De-duplication has a clean plain-value contract.
  • which Index selection helpers have a clean plain-value contract.
  • which.max Index selection helpers have a clean plain-value contract.
  • which.min Index selection helpers have a clean plain-value contract.
Explicit non-goals (1233)

Next

  • adjustcolor Color transforms have a clean plain-value contract.
  • col2rgb Color conversion has a clean plain-value contract.
  • colorRamp Color interpolation helpers have a useful portability contract.
  • contourLines Contour extraction returns plain-value path data.
  • rgb Color composition has a clean plain-value contract.
  • rgb2hsv Color conversion has a clean plain-value contract.

Next

  • cor Correlation helpers are strong plain-value statistical targets.
  • cov Covariance helpers are strong plain-value statistical targets.
  • fivenum Five-number summaries produce a clean numeric-array result.
  • mad Robust scalar statistics are useful plain-value targets.
  • median Aggregate statistics helpers are strong plain-value portability targets.
  • quantile Quantile helpers return a clean numeric summary result.
  • sd Aggregate statistics helpers are strong plain-value portability targets.
  • var Aggregate statistics helpers are strong plain-value portability targets.
  • weighted.mean Weighted aggregation has a clean plain-value contract.

Locutus

All your standard libraries will be assimilated into our JavaScript TypeScript collective. Resistance is futile.


Follow @locutus_io Star
